news.title:
Kotak Equities updates its model portfolio, adding Groww and Swiggy, while removing Max Healthcare and Pidilite Industries.
Groww is favored for its capital market presence, while Swiggy faces concerns over competition and food delivery sustainability.
news.summary:
Kotak Equities updates its model portfolio, adding Groww and Swiggy, while removing Max Healthcare and Pidilite Industries.
Groww is favored for its capital market presence, while Swiggy faces concerns over competition and food delivery sustainability.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries forms JV in Tanzania for construction chemicals, waterproofing.
Pidilite International holds 55%, Insignia Limited holds 45%; targets East Africa sector.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries forms JV in Tanzania for construction chemicals, waterproofing.
Pidilite International holds 55%, Insignia Limited holds 45%; targets East Africa sector.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries executed a block trade of ~700,450 shares at Rs. 1495.5.
The trade amounted to Rs. 104.75 crores on the NSE platform.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries executed a block trade of ~700,450 shares at Rs. 1495.5.
The trade amounted to Rs. 104.75 crores on the NSE platform.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries reports Q3 FY26 standalone revenue of INR 3,425 cr, up 11%.
Domestic UVG rose 11%, exports fell 13.5% due to geopolitical issues.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries reports Q3 FY26 standalone revenue of INR 3,425 cr, up 11%.
Domestic UVG rose 11%, exports fell 13.5% due to geopolitical issues.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries' subsidiary to invest Rs. 3.75 crore in Buildnext via convertible preference shares.
Post-conversion, holding capped at 34%; Buildnext's FY25 turnover projected at Rs. 18.38 crore.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries' subsidiary to invest Rs. 3.75 crore in Buildnext via convertible preference shares.
Post-conversion, holding capped at 34%; Buildnext's FY25 turnover projected at Rs. 18.38 crore.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries targets EBITDA between 20%-24%, aiming for the higher end this year.
The company plans to reinvest margin growth into new opportunities for faster expansion.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries targets EBITDA between 20%-24%, aiming for the higher end this year.
The company plans to reinvest margin growth into new opportunities for faster expansion.

news.title:
Pidilite MD expects sustained double-digit growth for the company.
Tariff cuts are anticipated to enhance Pidilite's export business.
news.summary:
Pidilite MD expects sustained double-digit growth for the company.
Tariff cuts are anticipated to enhance Pidilite's export business.

news.title: Goldman Sachs reiterates 'Buy' on Pidilite, target price Rs 1,700.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs reiterates 'Buy' on Pidilite, target price Rs 1,700.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries Q3 net profit rose to ₹6.2B from ₹5.52B YoY, below ₹6.25B estimate.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹37.1B from ₹33.69B YoY, showcasing strong growth.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries Q3 net profit rose to ₹6.2B from ₹5.52B YoY, below ₹6.25B estimate.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹37.1B from ₹33.69B YoY, showcasing strong growth.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries announces its schedule for Analyst/Investor meetings under SEBI regulations.
Meetings include Nuvama on 9th Feb, Axis Capital on 11th Feb, and Franklin Templeton on 13th Feb.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries announces its schedule for Analyst/Investor meetings under SEBI regulations.
Meetings include Nuvama on 9th Feb, Axis Capital on 11th Feb, and Franklin Templeton on 13th Feb.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries delivered an 11% CAGR over five years, with TSR at 70% due to dividends.
Despite 20% annual EPS growth, share price lagged market returns and dropped 2.9% last year.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries delivered an 11% CAGR over five years, with TSR at 70% due to dividends.
Despite 20% annual EPS growth, share price lagged market returns and dropped 2.9% last year.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries' board to meet on 3rd Feb 2026 to review Q3 and 9-month unaudited results.
Meeting details shared as per SEBI regulations; stock codes: BSE-500331, NSE-PIDILITIND.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries' board to meet on 3rd Feb 2026 to review Q3 and 9-month unaudited results.
Meeting details shared as per SEBI regulations; stock codes: BSE-500331, NSE-PIDILITIND.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries' subsidiary transferred 100 shares in Pepperfry to TCC via share swap.
Post-transfer, the subsidiary owns 2.2% of TCC; transaction isn't related party.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries' subsidiary transferred 100 shares in Pepperfry to TCC via share swap.
Post-transfer, the subsidiary owns 2.2% of TCC; transaction isn't related party.

news.title:
HDFC Bank and Pidilite are the only Indian stocks delivering positive annual returns consistently since 2015, showcasing long-term compounding strength.
Analysts remain positive, with HDFC Bank and Pidilite offering 15% and 12% return potential, respectively, despite premium valuations and market risks.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank and Pidilite are the only Indian stocks delivering positive annual returns consistently since 2015, showcasing long-term compounding strength.
Analysts remain positive, with HDFC Bank and Pidilite offering 15% and 12% return potential, respectively, despite premium valuations and market risks.

news.title:
Pidilite expands its paints brand Haisha to eastern markets, focusing on rural and semi-urban areas. The cautious rollout aims to refine its business model.
FY26 H1 topline rose 10.2% YoY to Rs 7,307.5 cr with 24% EBITDA margins. Growth driven by adhesives and home improvement focus.
news.summary:
Pidilite expands its paints brand Haisha to eastern markets, focusing on rural and semi-urban areas. The cautious rollout aims to refine its business model.
FY26 H1 topline rose 10.2% YoY to Rs 7,307.5 cr with 24% EBITDA margins. Growth driven by adhesives and home improvement focus.

news.title:
FMCG CEOs at CII Summit highlighted GST 2.0's role in boosting growth via affordability, branded consumption, and reforms.
Companies like Marico, GCPL, and Pidilite emphasized innovation and rural penetration to capitalize on evolving consumption trends.
news.summary:
FMCG CEOs at CII Summit highlighted GST 2.0's role in boosting growth via affordability, branded consumption, and reforms.
Companies like Marico, GCPL, and Pidilite emphasized innovation and rural penetration to capitalize on evolving consumption trends.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries announces analyst/investor meetings as per SEBI regulations.
Meetings include a roadshow on Dec 16 and a session with Axis Mutual Fund on Dec 19.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries announces analyst/investor meetings as per SEBI regulations.
Meetings include a roadshow on Dec 16 and a session with Axis Mutual Fund on Dec 19.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries schedules an analyst/investor meeting on 9 Dec 2025, 3-4 PM.
The meeting will be held in Mumbai as a physical interaction with a single institution.
news.summary:

news.title:
Pidilite Ventures invests in MagicDecor, a sustainable home décor startup specializing in wallpapers, blinds, and curtains.
The investment aims to boost capacity, technology, and distribution, reflecting Pidilite's focus on the home improvement sector.
news.summary:
Pidilite Ventures invests in MagicDecor, a sustainable home décor startup specializing in wallpapers, blinds, and curtains.
The investment aims to boost capacity, technology, and distribution, reflecting Pidilite's focus on the home improvement sector.

news.title:
Pidilite Industries' subsidiary to invest Rs. 5.1 Cr in MagicDecor.
Investment capped at 20% equity; MagicDecor's turnover was Rs. 6.3 Cr in March 2025.
news.summary:
Pidilite Industries' subsidiary to invest Rs. 5.1 Cr in MagicDecor.
Investment capped at 20% equity; MagicDecor's turnover was Rs. 6.3 Cr in March 2025.
